testcase.name: test_api_endpoint_timeout

failure.message: AssertionError: Endpoint exceeded latency threshold assert 120 <= 50

testcase.failure:
def test_api_endpoint_timeout(): # Simulating an API endpoint that took too long and failed expected_latency = 50 actual_latency = 120 > assert actual_latency <= expected_latency, "Endpoint exceeded latency threshold" E AssertionError: Endpoint exceeded latency threshold E assert 120 <= 50
test_cicd.py:13: AssertionError
